name: APA VP
notes: APA VP = APA Venture Partners. Pre-seed/seed VC founded 2020, based in San Francisco, CA at 500 Terry Francois St.

name: Ascent
notes: Too ambiguous — many companies named 'Ascent': Ascent Venture Partners (Bedford MA VC), Ascent fintech (San Diego, student loans), Ascent (RegTech), Ascent Platform (financial data). No domain or other field to disambiguate. Cannot identify with confidence.

name: Avenir
notes: Avenir Growth Capital — growth equity firm founded 2017, HQ at 817 Broadway, New York, NY 10003.

name: Backwards Capital
notes: Early-stage VC founded 2024 by Chris Zarou, headquartered in New York, NY.

name: Bain Capital Ventures
notes: VC arm of Bain Capital, founded 2001. HQ in Boston, MA; also has offices in NYC and San Francisco.

name: Banter
notes: Too ambiguous — multiple 'Banter' companies: Banter (nightlife social app, SF), Banter (conversational commerce, Palo Alto), Banter Capital (Web3 VC), Banter (chat app, Austin TX). No domain or other field to disambiguate.

name: Beat Ventures
notes: Pre-seed/seed VC founded 2021, focused on applied AI companies, based in San Francisco, CA.

name: Benchstrength
notes: Early-stage VC firm founded 2022, HQ at 220 Fifth Avenue, 17th Floor, New York, NY 10001. Domain/website already present in input.

name: Blank Ventures
notes: Early-stage VC founded 2021, focused on fintech/financial innovation. HQ at 2180 Bryant St Suite 201, San Francisco, CA 94110.

name: Bluewatch VC
notes: Formally 'Bluewatch Ventures'. Seed/early-stage VC founded 2021, focused on software, financial services, and fintech. Based in New York City.

name: Boldstart Ventures
notes: Inception-stage enterprise VC. Primary HQ listed as Miami, FL (3350 Virginia St, 2nd Floor); also operates from New York. Website uses .vc TLD (Saint Vincent and the Grenadines registrar, but company is US-based).

name: Boost VC
notes: Pre-seed accelerator/VC founded 2012, $400M AUM, focused on sci-fi tech (space, bio, energy, robotics, crypto). HQ in San Mateo, CA.
